title: Free Trials Are Engineered to Drain $1,200 From You
hook: That free trial form asked for your credit card for one reason — and it had nothing to do with your convenience.
angle: Companies deliberately set trial lengths, cancellation friction, and charge timing to exploit the forgetting window — it's a billion-dollar dark pattern hiding in plain sight
audience: Anyone who has ever signed up for a free trial using a credit card
key_numbers: 48% of people never recognize free trial charges on their statement
3.4 forgotten trial subscriptions per average American
7 screens to cancel vs 3 clicks to sign up
